---
title: "Life Beyond the Desk"
subtitle: "Ruairí Cullen : Behind the Scenes"

---

*Some small things about me that don't quite fit on a CV - but matter just as much.*

---

## 🏃 Sport & Fitness

Sport has always been a cornerstone of my life - whether it's pushing through the final 
miles of a marathon or enjoying football with friends. 

![Dublin Marathon 2024 - raising €1,700 for the Child Health Foundation](../images/sport1.jpg){fig-alt="Dublin Marathon" width="400px"}

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Always more enjoyable with good company](../images/sport2.png){fig-alt="Sport with friends" width="280px"}
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
![Cannot leave out my beloved Liverpool F.C](../images/sport3.png){fig-alt="Liverpool FC" width="280px"}
:::
::::

---

## 🌍 Travel

I love to broaden my perspective by getting out there and seeing the world. Every trip teaches me something new!

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
::: {.travel-photo}
![Walking the Island of Sardinia](../images/travel1.jpg)
:::
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
::: {.travel-photo}
![Brushing up on my Italiano!](../images/travel2.jpg)
:::
:::
::::

---

## 🇮🇪 As Gaeilge

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
Is cainteoir díograsach Gaeilge mé agus is aoibhinn liom mo theanga féin. Táim líofa agus d’fhreastail mé ar an nGaeltacht ceithre huaire chun feabhas a chur ar mo chuid Gaeilge. Is léir go bhfuil an teanga an tábhachtach le haghaidh mo fhéiniúlacht agus mo chultúr.

*I am a passionate Irish speaker and I love my own language. I am fluent and have attended the Gaeltacht four times to improve my Irish. It is clear that the language is very important to my identity and my culture.*
:::

## 🎥 Even Some Modelling...

Not something that makes it onto the CV - but here we are! Featured in an ad for WillowWarm, a Shamrock Products Ltd product.

[▶ Watch the Ad on Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/willowwarmirl/reel/DTNws2yjNCv/){target="_blank" .btn .btn-primary}
